category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: No XML sitemap found
No robots.txt found

category.name: Core SEO
category.rule: Title too short Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (5/25): - / (JUSTLearn (9 chars)) - /login (JUSTLearn (9 chars)) - /register (JUSTLearn (9 chars)) - /pricing (JUSTLearn (9 chars)) - /about (JUSTLearn (9 chars))

No H1 tag found Pages (5/24): /about, /blog, /careers, /categories, /classes Items (5/24): - /login (No H1 tag found) - /register (No H1 tag found) - /pricing (No H1 tag found) - /about (No H1 tag found) - /contact (No H1 tag found)

Description too short Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (5/25): - / (Explore || Learn || Build || Share (34 chars)) - /login (Explore || Learn || Build || Share (34 chars)) - /register (Explore || Learn || Build || Share (34 chars)) - /pricing (Explore || Learn || Build || Share (34 chars)) - /about (Explore || Learn || Build || Share (34 chars))
Missing canonical URL Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories
Missing og:title; Missing og:description; Missing og:image - social shares will lack imagery Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories
1 duplicate title(s) affecting 25 pages Items (1): - justlearn ("justlearn..." (25 pages)) [pageCount: 25] (from: /, /login, /register, /pricing, /about; +20 more)
No Twitter card or Open Graph tags for Twitter sharing Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories

category.name: Security
category.rule: Page not served over HTTPS Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories
No Content-Security-Policy header
No clickjacking protection

category.name: Links
category.rule: 12 orphan page(s) with <2 incoming links Items (5/12): - /pricing - /about - /contact - /careers - /blog

2 link(s) have empty anchor text Pages (5/11): /, /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science Items (2): - / | <a href="/"><div class="relative flex aspect-square items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary dark:bg-second... - /courses | <a href="/courses"><div class="relative flex aspect-square items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-secondary dark:bg...

category.name: Content

category.name: Images
category.rule: 1 image(s) missing width/height (causes CLS) Pages (3): /, /courses, /courses?categories=Web+Development Items (1): - /_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fres.cloudinary.com%2Fdjyzlmzoe%2Fimage%2Fupload%2Fv1772954527%2FJUSTLearn%2F3b7977beedfd76c038270e46029cdeca.avif&w=3840&q=75 |

category.name: Performance
category.rule: 1 JS file(s) exceed 1.0 MB; 2 JS file(s) exceed 250.0 KB Items (3): - /_next/static/chunks/node_modules_next_dist_compiled_2ce9398a._.js [sizeBytes: 1109716, size: 1.1 MB, status: 200, contentType: application/javascript; charset=UTF-8] (from: /, /login, /register, /pricing, /about; +20 more) - /_next/static/chunks/node_modules_next_dist_client_8f19e6fb._.js [sizeBytes: 997850, size: 974.5 KB, status: 200, contentType: application/javascript; charset=UTF-8] (from: /, /login, /register, /pricing, /about; +20 more) - /_next/static/chunks/node_modules_ef55f655._.js [sizeBytes: 991569, size: 968.3 KB, status: 200, contentType: application/javascript; charset=UTF-8] (from: /, /login, /register, /pricing, /about; +20 more)

category.name: Accessibility
category.rule: Buttons without accessible names Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (4): - button.flex - button.lg:hidden - button.absolute - button

1 problematic ID(s) in ARIA attributes Pages (5/9): /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science, /courses?categories=Humanities+%26+English Items (1): - "radix-┬½R2b7nbb7l7┬╗" (not found)

N command element(s) without accessible names Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (5): - button[type="submit"] - button[type="submit"] - a[href="/"] - a[href="/courses"] - button[type="button"]

8 focusable element(s) inside aria-hidden Pages (5/9): /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science, /courses?categories=Humanities+%26+English Items (5/8): - input (self is focusable) - input (self is focusable) - input (self is focusable) - input (self is focusable) - input (self is focusable)

8 input field(s) without accessible names Pages (5/9): /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science, /courses?categories=Humanities+%26+English Items (5/8): - input[type="checkbox"] - input[type="checkbox"] - input[type="checkbox"] - input[type="checkbox"] - input[type="checkbox"]

N button(s) without accessible names Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (5/12): - flex h-10 w-10 items-center ju - lg:hidden ml-2 - absolute inset-y-0 right-0 pr- - button - category-0

9 form input(s) without labels Pages (5/9): /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science, /courses?categories=Humanities+%26+English Items (5/9): - text - checkbox - checkbox - checkbox - checkbox

N potential color contrast issue(s) Pages (5/25): /, /about, /blog, /careers, /categories Items (5/20): - svg with class "tabler-icon tabler-icon-layout..." may have low contrast - div with class "absolute inset-0 -z-10 rounded..." may have low contrast - div with class "relative left-[calc(50%-11rem)..." may have low contrast - p with class "text-muted-foreground max-w-2x..." may have low contrast - p with class "text-muted-foreground..." may have low contrast

2 link(s) with no accessible text; 2 link(s) with generic text Pages (5/11): /, /courses, /courses?categories=AI+%26+Machine+Learning, /courses?categories=Business+%26+Management, /courses?categories=Data+Science Items (4): - / (svg-no-name) - /courses (svg-no-name) - login - register

category.rule: No content pages have author attribution
